title: JABOM
body: This is just a bunch of mods I found on Modrinth. The whole point of making this modpack was to show the variety of mods that had updated to 1.20 after about a week of it being out. This is literally the definition of a kitchen sink as the mods within sometimes cause eachother to crash the game. Hope you have fun! Also probably not going to update this modpack... like ever.
